notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons manager remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.16.
Lead magnet naming and delivery remain from CC7.5.19/CC7.5.18.
Added safe lead-magnet conditions screen: access for everyone or only subscribers of current channel.
Added DB schema for future conditions: lead_access_mode, lead_conditions_json, lead_conditions_enabled.
Planned conditions are shown as disabled/soon placeholders: comment count, keyword in comments, multiple channels, referral.
Actual gift/lead-magnet save and post patching are delegated to accepted CC7.5.18 flow; no delivery logic is rewritten in this build.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: controlled wrapper only; no clean-core merge until behavior is accepted.
